rules.name: allow-local-read-only-git-ops
rules.description: Allow read-only local git operations only when paths are within the sandbox.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Read-only local git operations are permitted within the sandbox.

rules.name: allow-git-none-role-tools
rules.description: Allow git tools that have only none-role arguments (no path arguments), like git_wrapup_instructions and git_clear_working_dir.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: These tools have no path arguments and are safe local operations.

rules.name: allow-local-git-add
rules.description: Allow git_add (staging files) as a local write operation.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: git_add only stages files locally and is a permitted local operation.

rules.name: allow-local-git-commit
rules.description: Allow git_commit as a local write-history operation.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: git_commit creates local commits which are permitted local write operations.

rules.name: allow-local-git-branch-read
rules.description: Allow reading branch information only when the path is within the sandbox.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Reading branch info is permitted for local repos within the sandbox.

rules.name: allow-local-git-branch-write
rules.description: Allow creating, renaming, and deleting local branches.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Local branch management is a permitted local write operation.

rules.name: allow-local-git-checkout
rules.description: Allow git_checkout for switching/creating branches or restoring files locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: git_checkout is a local operation permitted by the constitution.

rules.name: allow-local-git-merge
rules.description: Allow git_merge for merging branches locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Local merges are permitted local write operations.

rules.name: allow-local-git-rebase
rules.description: Allow git_rebase for rebasing locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Local rebase is a permitted local write operation.

rules.name: allow-local-git-reset
rules.description: Allow git_reset for local HEAD/index resets.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Local reset operations are permitted local write operations.

rules.name: allow-local-git-cherry-pick
rules.description: Allow git_cherry_pick for applying commits locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Cherry-pick is a local write operation permitted by the constitution.

rules.name: allow-local-git-stash
rules.description: Allow git_stash for stashing/restoring local changes.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Stash operations are local and permitted by the constitution.

rules.name: allow-local-git-tag
rules.description: Allow git_tag for creating/deleting local tags.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Local tag management is a permitted local write operation.

rules.name: allow-local-git-remote-read
rules.description: Allow reading remote configuration locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Listing/reading remotes is a local read operation.

rules.name: allow-local-git-remote-write
rules.description: Allow local modifications to remote configuration (add, remove, rename, set-url).
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Modifying local remote config entries is a local write operation.

rules.name: escalate-git-remote-url
rules.description: Require human approval when git_remote is called with a remote URL (add, set-url operations).
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: Modifying remote URLs involves network-reachable endpoints and requires human approval.

rules.name: allow-local-git-init
rules.description: Allow git_init only when the target path is within the sandbox.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Initializing a local repo is permitted only within the sandbox.

rules.name: allow-local-git-worktree
rules.description: Allow git_worktree write/delete operations only when ALL paths are within the sandbox.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Worktree management is permitted only when all paths are within the sandbox.

rules.name: allow-local-git-clean
rules.description: Allow git_clean to remove untracked files locally.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to perform all local read and write git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Cleaning untracked files is a permitted local write operation.

rules.name: escalate-git-fetch
rules.description: Require human approval for git_fetch (fetches from remote).
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: git_fetch communicates with a remote repository and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-git-pull
rules.description: Require human approval for git_pull (fetches and merges from remote).
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: git_pull communicates with a remote repository and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-git-push
rules.description: Require human approval for git_push (pushes to remote).
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: git_push communicates with a remote repository and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-git-clone
rules.description: Require human approval for git_clone (clones from remote).
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: git_clone communicates with a remote repository and requires human approval per the constitution.
